sources.limitations: Does not address foreign convictions outside the reported criminal-history search scope. Closed-world absence is limited to convictions recorded within the FBI criminal-history database as of the stated date; does not cover sealed, expunged, foreign, or non-reporting jurisdiction records.
sources.title: FBI criminal history check

sources.limitations: Only current pending charges as of the search date. Limited to federal and state dockets covered by the search; does not cover local/municipal courts, tribal courts, foreign charges, or sealed matters.
sources.title: Federal and state docket search
